mission.title: backstage: Migrate to React 18
mission.description:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

Closes backstage/backstage#12252

This switches all packages to React 18. The largest chunk of this work is updates to support the new version of `@testing-library/react` that only supports React 18. Unfortunately there doesn't seem to be a sane way to partially migrate apps due to TLR only supporting one of either React 17 or 18 at a time.

Migration docs to follow assuming this all works out. Couple of notes I've taken so far regarding the test changes:

- Seems to be better to call `await act(async () => {})` after render rather than around
- Waiting for mock functions to be called and then expecting render state to be updated is no longer reliable
- renderHook no longer forwards initial props to wrapper
- Rendered components often don't immediately update on user input, it's more important to use `act` now

Overall I was pretty pleased with the type of breakages I encountered in tests. Most breakages was due existing tests not being explicit abo
